arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'lining up £51m offer' for 6ft 5in Germany international
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly lining up a £51m offer for Inter Milan defender Yann Bisseck, who has impressed for the Italian giants this season.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Wolves – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Europa League semi-finalists Manchester United welcome an in-form Wolverhampton Wanderers to Old Trafford this Sunday. Emotions will still be high after that miraculous 5-4 victory over Lyon in the second leg of their crazy quarter-final in midweek. Ruben Amorim suggested some players will be rested this afternoon following their dramatic exploits on Thursday night. arts.ttl: How to watch Man United vs Wolves
arts.sum: Audio coverage of the pre-match build-up, full 90 minutes and post-match reaction of Man United vs Wolves is available via Wolves TV and the Wolves App. Live text coverage of Man United vs Wolves is also being provided on Sunday afternoon as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.
